projectMetadata.name: InstaFlow Scheduler
projectMetadata.description: Production-ready full-stack web application for scheduling Instagram reels and image posts with automated content fetching, processing, and publishing
projectMetadata.author: Jay Bhimani

projectOverview.purpose: Instagram automation platform for anime content creators
keyValue: Instant reel posting with retry logic
Scheduled daily posting at configurable time slots
coreFeatures: Reddit anime content fetching and filtering
Manual media upload and URL import
Daily scheduled posting at user-defined times
Real-time queue and post history tracking
Theme customization with multiple color schemes
Instagram account insights and metrics display

pages.name: DashboardView
pages.purpose: Main application hub with multiple functional tabs

navigation.desktopLayout: Fixed left sidebar with orb-style navigation

components.glassPanels: Frosted glass effect with backdrop blur and gradient borders
components.cards: rounded panels with shadow and hover effects

animations: smooth transitions on all interactive elements

process.scheduled: Batch processor ticks every minute, executes due posts

schedulerLogic.dataModel: Post document in MongoDB with status enum
postStatuses: failed - Exhausted retries or non-recoverable error

automationFlow.step2: Fetch Reddit anime candidates (based on subreddits, filters)
automationFlow.step3: Filter by: score, dimensions, age, keywords
automationFlow.step4: Create Post document + queue at scheduledTime
automationFlow.step5: processPendingPosts() finds due posts and uploads

instantPosting.behavior: Bypasses batch queue, directly processes single post

flow: 3. Inline retry loop (not waiting for cron)

dailyScheduler.behavior: Daily posts at user-specified times using cron tick

implementation.prevention: Won't double-post same content in same slot

activationFlow: 3. User sets time slots and timezone
4. API sets enabled=true and triggers immediate tick
5. Cron checks every minute if time matches
6. When match: fetch Reddit → queue → upload

redditIntegration.apiMethod: User-Agent based Reddit API (no OAuth required)

processing: Internally transcode with ffmpeg to Instagram specs
Mux audio if separate track needed
Pass URL to Instagram Graph API
errorHandling: REEL_STILL_PROCESSING: Transaction not yet ready, retry
Only photo or video: Format mismatch, convert & retry
instagramIntegration.publicUrlRequirement: Instagram must download media from public HTTP(S) URL, not localhost or private network

reel.output: MP4 (H.264 video + AAC audio, Instagram spec)
reel.audioMuxing: If separate audio track: merge video + audio

features.hashtags: Type-specific base tags + dynamic tags from keywords

queueManagement.dataModel: Post collection with status + scheduledTime indexes
userActions: View post details and error messages

themingSystem.customization: Full color override for each theme component

stateManagement.noGlobalStateLibrary: No Redux/Context API - kept simple for medium-complexity app

patterns.dashboardView: 22+ useState hooks managing different UI sections

criticalStates.name: pendingPosts
criticalStates.comparison: Deep equality check to prevent unnecessary re-renders

stateManagement.dataFlowDiagram: User Input → API Call → Update State → Re-render → UI Update

manualPostCreation.uiUpdate: Add to pendingPosts array, switch to 'pending' tab

backend.2: Filter by config (subreddits, score, age, keywords)
backend.4: Extract media (video URL from reddit_video or image)

processPostNow.logic: Lock post → call publishPost(post) → check status

autoAnimeExecution.uiUpdate: Show dynamic island notification with result

backend.2: Set timeSlots and timezone from user input

dailyScheduleActivation.ongoing: Every minute, cron checks if current time matches any slot
dailyScheduleActivation.execution: Fetch Reddit → Create Post → Upload (via batch processor)

postProcessing.trigger: Cron tick (every minute) or instant call
postProcessing.find: Posts with status=pending AND scheduledTime <= now
postProcessing.upload: Call publishPost() via Instagram Graph API

results.reason: Retryable error, re-queue with delayed scheduledTime

postProcessing.cleanupPhase: Delete local media file if posted successfully

nonRetryable: Only photo or video accepted (type mismatch)
errorRecovery.userVisibility: errorLog stored in Post, displayed in UI

fields.mediaUrl: String - public URL of posted media
fields.caption: String (max 2200) - Instagram caption text
fields.driveFileId: String (optional) - Google Drive ID if sourced
fields.sourceId: String - Reddit post ID or source identifier
fields.localMediaPath: String - Path to temp file during processing
fields.localMediaDeletedAt: Date - When temp file was cleaned up
fields.scheduledTime: Date - When to publish (or null for immediate)

AutoAnimeConfig.lastRunBySlot: Map<String, Date> - Last execution per slot

missingAndIncompleteFeatures.details: Files uploaded but Drive sync incomplete. Routes exist but limited functionality.
Can write post metrics to sheets, but not wired to UI
Shows recent media metrics, missing trending analysis, optimal post times
missingAndIncompleteFeatures.improvement: Add algorithmic suggestions for best posting times

missingAndIncompleteFeatures.details: UI doesn't allow user to customize rotating sets
missingAndIncompleteFeatures.improvement: Add admin panel for hashtag pool management

missingAndIncompleteFeatures.details: Music and uploads stored locally, no UI for browsing/organizing
missingAndIncompleteFeatures.improvement: Add file browser UI with tagging

missingAndIncompleteFeatures.details: No emoji support, no mention formatting
missingAndIncompleteFeatures.improvement: Add emoji picker and mention autocomplete

missingAndIncompleteFeatures.details: Can't edit multiple queued posts at once
No visual calendar view of scheduled posts
missingAndIncompleteFeatures.improvement: Add calendar grid showing posts by date

missingAndIncompleteFeatures.details: No AI suggestions for trending audio/captions
missingAndIncompleteFeatures.improvement: Integrate trending audio API + caption suggestions

missingAndIncompleteFeatures.details: Extracts full caption but doesn't parse mentions/hashtags separately
missingAndIncompleteFeatures.improvement: Extract mentions and suggested hashtags intelligently

performanceAndUXIssues.description: Backend spins down after 15 min inactivity, first request takes 20-40 seconds
performanceAndUXIssues.solution: Upgrade to Render paid tier or use Uptime Robot pings to keep warm

performanceAndUXIssues.description: Video transcoding via ffmpeg can take 30-180 seconds depending on file size
performanceAndUXIssues.solution: Show detailed progress UI, or implement background job queue (Bull/BullMQ)

performanceAndUXIssues.description: Queue and history refresh via polling every 10s, can feel stale
performanceAndUXIssues.solution: Implement Socket.io for real-time push updates

performanceAndUXIssues.description: Dashboard polls every 10s even if no activity, wastes bandwidth
performanceAndUXIssues.solution: Reduce poll interval to 30s or implement debouncing with activity detection

performanceAndUXIssues.description: Instagram Graph API requires public URL to download media, local development problematic
performanceAndUXIssues.solution: Use ngrok/cloudflare tunnel, or build local proxy endpoint

performanceAndUXIssues.description: 300MB file size limit may reject some media, Instagram actual limit is stricter
performanceAndUXIssues.solution: Enforce tighter validation (max 100MB), provide clear feedback

performanceAndUXIssues.description: History tab shows all posts, hard to find specific post
performanceAndUXIssues.solution: Add search by caption, date range filter, status filter

performanceAndUXIssues.description: File picker on mobile can be clunky, no camera shortcut
performanceAndUXIssues.solution: Use <input accept='image/*, video/*'> to open camera on mobile

performanceAndUXIssues.description: Long error logs truncated to 500 chars in UI

performanceAndUXIssues.issue: Theme Color Inconsistency on Dark Mode
performanceAndUXIssues.description: Theme system is light-mode only, no dark mode variant
performanceAndUXIssues.solution: Add dark theme preset + prefers-color-scheme detection

items: Clean separation of concerns (services, routes, models)
Comprehensive error handling with descriptive messages
Transactional safety via MongoDB atomic updates
Environment-based configuration with validation
CORS properly configured for cross-origin requests
Retry logic prevents transient failures
Status enums prevent invalid state transitions
No request validation library (should use joi/yup)
Error handling inconsistent (some caught, some not tested)
No logging framework (console.log only)
No API rate limiting implemented
No caching strategy (every request hits DB)
Database queries not optimized (no lean() in some places)
No automated tests (unit, integration, or e2e)
SessionStorage/LocalStorage logic could be simpler
Cache AutoAnimeConfig in memory with TTL
Batch indexing for Post queries (status, scheduledTime)
Implement request deduplication in API calls
Lazy load DashboardView tabs (split bundle)
Virtualize long lists (if history grows large)
Debounce config saves in anime automation tab

securityConsiderations.notes: Suitable for single admin user, not multi-tenant
All authenticated users get full access
improvements: Implement audit logging for sensitive actions

securityConsiderations.notes: Acceptable for small app, .env file should never be committed
Good, all external APIs use HTTPS

securityConsiderations.status: No user PII collected beyond admin email
securityConsiderations.notes: GDPR-friendly, no email campaigns to users
Should add virus scanning for production

routes/.auth.routes.js: Authentication endpoints (login, token status, account details)
routes/.post.routes.js: Post CRUD endpoints (create, list, delete, upload)
routes/.auto-anime.routes.js: Automation endpoints (config, run-now, daily activation, manual tick)

services/.anime-automation.service.js: Reddit fetching, candidate filtering, post creation
services/.scheduler.service.js: Post upload orchestration, retry logic, state management
services/.instagram.service.js: Instagram Graph API publishing, media handling
services/.media-extract.service.js: URL fetching, media type detection, format conversion

backend.server.js: Express app bootstrap and error handling
backend.app.js: Express middleware setup, route mounting, error handlers

hooks/.useAuth.js: Session validation, login, logout, token management

services/.api.js: Axios instance with auth interceptor, API base URL resolution

frontend.App.jsx: App routing (login vs dashboard), lazy loading
frontend.styles.css: Global Tailwind + CSS variables for theming

recommendedNextSteps.details: Unit tests for services, integration tests for APIs, E2E for critical flows
Add winston/pino for structured logs, integrate Sentry/DataDog for error tracking
Use joi/yup for input validation on all API endpoints
Use express-rate-limit to prevent abuse on auth/posting endpoints
Add .lean() where appropriate, index optimization, query analysis
Replace polling with WebSocket for queue/history updates
Move video transcoding to async queue (Bull/BullMQ) for faster API responses
Add calendar component showing scheduled posts by date
